competitors.name: Unstructured
competitors.meta_tool_angle: pdfmux is lighter and faster for PDF-only pipelines. Use Unstructured when you need 20+ format support.

competitors.name: LlamaParse
competitors.meta_tool_angle: pdfmux runs locally with no API keys. Use LlamaParse for complex layouts if you're already in the LlamaIndex ecosystem.

competitors.name: Docling
competitors.meta_tool_angle: pdfmux routes table-heavy pages to Docling automatically. You get Docling's accuracy without paying its speed cost on every page.

competitors.name: Marker
competitors.meta_tool_angle: Marker is great with a GPU. pdfmux handles 90% of PDFs without ML and only calls heavy extractors when needed.

competitors.name: PyMuPDF
competitors.meta_tool_angle: pdfmux uses PyMuPDF as its fast path for digital PDFs. You get PyMuPDF speed plus automatic OCR fallback when PyMuPDF can't handle a page.

competitors.name: pdfplumber
competitors.description: Detailed PDF text and table extraction
competitors.meta_tool_angle: pdfplumber gives fine-grained control. pdfmux gives pipeline-ready output with automatic quality checks.

competitors.name: Kreuzberg
competitors.meta_tool_angle: Both route between extractors. pdfmux adds per-page confidence scoring and self-healing re-extraction.
